Intro_text:
Your job on this task is to catch all the boxes that appear in a special spot on the screen.

I will show you a box in the special spot.
Push the button when you see it.

Press SPACE to continue
Correct_text:
Good job!
Every time you see that box, press the button.

If you see a box somewhere else, it's not a special box.
Here are some other places you might see boxes. Do not press the button for these boxes.

Press SPACE to continue
Practice_text:
Now let's practice.

You will see boxes on the screen.
Push the button EVERY TIME the box is in the special spot.
Do not push the button for other boxes.

Press SPACE to continue
Task_text:
Great job on the practice.
Now you are ready For the task.

It will get long. Keep trying your best.
See if you can catch ALL the special boxes!

Press SPACE to continue
Exit_text:
Great job! You finished!

Press SPACE to Exit!
